creator: zbiggy@o2.pl
text:
I tried to use holographic rescue mode on 8.0-RELEASE-i386-dvd1.iso but this mode has no basic and useful tools: mount, cmp, ls, fdisk. Please add them.

Fix: 

Please add mount, cmp, ls, fdisk commands to holographic rescue mode so this mode can become really useful.
How-To-Repeat: Boot from 8.0-RELEASE-i386-dvd1.iso and go to holographic rescue mode. It will appear on VT4. Type in any of the commands: mount, cmp, ls, fdisk to see that they are not present. Command not found.
